title: Evangelion Store renewal event with new illustration
display_title: Evangelion Store renewal event with new illustration
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Store renewal event with new illustration             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Apr 08, 2018 10:10 pm tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) ( https://twitter.com/eva_store/status/983178162170310659 , http://www.eva-info.jp/4084 ) Okay, that April commemorative illustration merch is super cute The store's having a renewal April 9th (today in Japan). I think the website is saying the first 3000 people to arrive will receive the clear folder?

[]: Re: Evangelion Store renewal event with new illustration             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Apr 09, 2018 2:34 am Um, there's something white on Shinji's hand! SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Evangelion Store renewal event with new illustration             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Apr 11, 2018 3:58 am I saw that. It looks beautiful with the petals falling down on the actual website. :) @pwhodges: I thought the same thing. EoE left an everlasting scar.

[]: Re: Evangelion Store renewal event with new illustration             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Fri Apr 13, 2018 2:05 pm That's really cute! I think Newtype had a poster very similar to that once, with the children hanging out together under a tree.
